monitoring_procedure: Temp-check every delivery with probe thermometer
Check and log temp 2x daily (open + close)
corrective_action: Adjust thermostat / move product / discard if >4hrs above 41°F
Adjust thermostat / move product / discard if thawed
Reheat to 165°F or discard if below 140°F for >2 hrs
Ice bath / smaller containers / discard if limits exceeded

critical_limit: All staff wash hands per schedule
